title: Opening Board via HTTP Link column in same window

posts.author: dragnet (Troy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is it possible to use a HTTP Link column to open another board in the same browser tab?

Right now I can definitely provide a link with search criteria in a Link column to open another board but it’s within a new tab.

Cheers…

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @dragnet,

Unfortunately it’s not possible to open another board in the same browser tab—links from the link column will open in a new tab.
